subject: Public Health
title: Menstrual Hygiene Management
description: A quick, practical guide to Menstrual Hygiene Management.

hook.text: 500 million women and girls lack adequate facilities for menstrual hygiene—a hidden public health crisis.

buildup.text: Without private toilets, clean water, and affordable products, menstruation becomes a barrier to daily life.

discovery.text: Girls in developing countries miss up to 20% of school days due to menstruation—widening the gender gap.

twist.text: Menstrual stigma is so strong in some cultures that girls are isolated, restricted from cooking, or considered impure.

climax.text: Integrating menstrual hygiene into WASH programs—with products, facilities, and education—is transformative.

punchline.text: Sanitation that ignores menstruation ignores half the population.

quiz.question: How much school do girls in developing countries miss due to menstruation?
